input.hiring_signal_brief: Recent job post for Senior DevOps Engineer; no public funding news.
input.bench_summary: 3 engineers available with Kubernetes and Terraform expertise; 2-week lead time.
input.pricing_policy: Fixed monthly fee per engineer; no hourly billing.

candidate_output: Your team seems to be struggling with scaling infrastructure—many companies in your space are hiring DevOps engineers to catch up. We have world-class engineers ready to jump in immediately. Let’s schedule a quick chat to fix this gap.
